title: lobelia gregoriana subsp. sattimae
intro: Lobelia gregoriana subsp. sattimae, also known as Lobelia sattimae, is a plant species in the genus Lobelia and is a subspecies of Lobelia gregoriana. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Lobelia gregoriana subsp. sattimae include its potential to aid in respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic and an anti-inflammatory. Herbal preparations of Lobelia sattimae include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, although the plant should be used with caution due to its potential toxicity and side effects.
